response.step_by_step_log: I watched the video and identified the performer as Ninomae Ina'nis. The song title 'VIOLET' was identified through the visual style and audio recognition common for this artist. I performed a search for 'Ninomae Ina'nis "VIOLET" lyrics Japanese and English' to retrieve the lyrics. I successfully mapped the scenes for the song.
response.global_summary: A live performance video of the song "VIOLET" by Ninomae Ina'nis, performed by Ninomae Ina'nis herself in a concert setting.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The night the flowers sleep, the stars reflected in the waves
The undulating moon tickles my feet
If I follow the flowing light
I wonder if it will reach you, who whispered in my ear
Even if we hold hands now, even if I embrace you with all my might
The sky will still fill with autumn
With my fingertips, swaying, swaying
Even the hardened wishes are
I know that smile, on the train drawn by the clouds, the rustling hair

It's okay now, even from afar
I want to make it come true
I'm embracing this world
Even though I want to hold it tight
In the dream's canvas
Continuing to draw
The meaning of doing so
Is shining in this chest
Story

Even the hardened wishes are
Melting away, extending my hand
It's okay now, even from afar
I want to reach it, I'm releasing this world
Even though I want to hold it tight
In the dream's canvas
Continuing to draw
The meaning of doing so
Is shining in this chest
Story
